result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Start From a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new doc, type a title, and then... the cursor blinks. Five minutes pass. Maybe ten. The blank page has a way of making even the clearest ideas feel suddenly out of reach, and we heard from so many of you that those first few sentences were the hardest part of your day. That's why we built **Smart Drafts** — because getting started shouldn't be the thing standing between you and your best work.

Here's how it works: when you create a new document, just click the ✨ Smart Draft button next to your title. We'll read the title you've written and glance at your recent docs for context — the project you've been shipping, the team you've been writing for, the shape of what you typically produce — and generate a tailored outline in seconds. Think of it as a thoughtful colleague who's been paying attention in meetings and is ready with a running start. You can accept it, edit it, or toss it entirely. The outline is a springboard, not a script, and your voice stays yours.

This is just the first step. Next on our roadmap is **custom voice training**, which will let Smart Drafts learn the rhythms and phrasing that make your writing sound like *you* — not a generic helpful assistant. We're rolling Smart Drafts out to everyone this week, and we can't wait to see what you start. As always, reply to this post or drop feedback in-app — we read every note.

Happy drafting. 🪄

# Introducing Smart Drafts: Never Start From a Blank Page Again

We've all been there. You open a new doc, type a title, and then... the cursor blinks. Five minutes pass. Maybe ten. The blank page has a way of making even the clearest ideas feel suddenly out of reach, and we heard from so many of you that those first few sentences were the hardest part of your day. That's why we built **Smart Drafts** — because getting started shouldn't be the thing standing between you and your best work.

Here's how it works: when you create a new document, just click the ✨ Smart Draft button next to your title. We'll read the title you've written and glance at your recent docs for context — the project you've been shipping, the team you've been writing for, the shape of what you typically produce — and generate a tailored outline in seconds. Think of it as a thoughtful colleague who's been paying attention in meetings and is ready with a running start. You can accept it, edit it, or toss it entirely. The outline is a springboard, not a script, and your voice stays yours.

This is just the first step. Next on our roadmap is **custom voice training**, which will let Smart Drafts learn the rhythms and phrasing that make your writing sound like *you* — not a generic helpful assistant. We're rolling Smart Drafts out to everyone this week, and we can't wait to see what you start. As always, reply to this post or drop feedback in-app — we read every note.

Happy drafting. 🪄
